# Open Source Licenses

LexPad is built on open source software. We are grateful to the communities behind these projects.

## LexPad

**Copyright © 2026 Codetails LTD**

LexPad application source code is published at [github.com/krunal039/LexPad](https://github.com/krunal039/LexPad).

License for LexPad itself is **to be determined (TBD)** — likely **GPL-3.0** because LexPad links against Scintilla and Lexilla. See the repository `LICENSE` file when published for the authoritative license text.

## Scintilla

[Scintilla](https://www.scintilla.org/) — source code editing component.

Copyright © 1998–2024 Neil Hodgson.

Distributed under the **License for Scintilla and SciTE** (similar to MIT — permits use, modification, and distribution with attribution). Full text: [scintilla.org/License.txt](https://www.scintilla.org/License.txt)

## Lexilla

[Lexilla](https://www.scintilla.org/Lexilla.html) — lexer library for Scintilla.

Copyright © 1998–2024 Neil Hodgson.

Same license as Scintilla (License for Scintilla and SciTE).

## Swift & SwiftUI

Apple Swift toolchain and frameworks are subject to [Apple’s open source licenses](https://swift.org/LICENSE.txt) and Apple SDK terms.

## macOS system frameworks

LexPad uses AppKit, Foundation, and other Apple system frameworks under the macOS SDK license.

## Notepad++ inspiration

LexPad is **inspired by** [Notepad++](https://notepad-plus-plus.org/) (GPL-2.0) but is an **independent native macOS reimplementation**. LexPad does not ship Notepad++ source code.

## Third-party vendored components

When you build LexPad from source, `./scripts/bootstrap.sh` downloads or builds:

| Component | Location | License |
|-----------|----------|---------|
| Scintilla | `Vendor/scintilla/` | Scintilla License |
| Lexilla | `Vendor/lexilla/` | Scintilla License |

## Reporting license issues

If you believe any attribution is missing or incorrect, please open an issue at [github.com/krunal039/LexPad/issues](https://github.com/krunal039/LexPad/issues).
